/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libvel_forwarder__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libvel_forwarder__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/vel_forwarder__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/vel_forwarder/msg/vel__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vel_forwarder__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/vel_forwarder/msg/buff_data__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vel_forwarder__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/vel_forwarder/msg/game_data__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vel_forwarder__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/vel_forwarder/msg/gimbal_angles__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vel_forwarder__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/vel_forwarder/msg/health__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vel_forwarder__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/vel_forwarder/msg/position_data__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vel_forwarder__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/vel_forwarder/msg/uwb_pos__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
